hero.title: I'm a Systems Developer
hero.stacks:
Main stacks: Java, SpringBoot, PHP, TypeScript, Laravel.
Creating new experiences with technology.

about.title: About Me
about.description_1: I'm a Back-End developer with a focus on Java, Spring Boot, PHP, REST APIs, and DevOps practices. I have practical experience in organizational and academic projects, always aiming to create scalable and efficient solutions. I've been studying Java for over 3 years, during which I've honed my skills in systems development, API integration, and software architecture best practices.
about.description_2: During my internship at the Regional Electoral Court of Tocantins (TRE-TO), I worked in the Infrastructure and Internal Systems Development area. I participated in the creation and maintenance of published applications that streamlined the daily work of public servants, optimizing administrative workflows.
about.description_3: I've developed and collaborated on various projects, from e-commerce systems to internal tools for the Court. I always seek to balance performance with technical quality. I believe technology is about solving real problems.

projects.title: Projects
projects.intro: Three selected projects that show my current focus on digital products, automation, and web development with a clean, result-oriented interface.

bettercash.label: Web App
bettercash.title: BetterCash
bettercash.description: A finance web system with AI applied to decision-making support, scenario reading, and assisted financial analysis.

employr.label: Web App
employr.title: Employr
employr.description: A job application governance app where the user records the job title and the channel used to submit the application, keeping the search process organized.

ffsystems.label: Software House
ffsystems.title: FFSystems
ffsystems.description: My software house focused on building landing pages for local businesses, with lean pages designed around clarity and conversion.
